mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO notification ( member_no, notification_type, title, content, link_url, order_no, delivery_no, event_key, read_yn, reg_date ) VALUES ( #{memberNo}, #{notificationType}, #{title}, #{content}, #{linkUrl}, #{orderNo}, #{deliveryNo}, #{eventKey}, 'N', NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT notification_no AS notificationNo, notification_type AS notificationType, title, content, link_url AS linkUrl, order_no AS orderNo, delivery_no AS deliveryNo, read_yn AS readYn, reg_date AS regDate, read_date AS readDate FROM notification WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} ORDER BY reg_date DESC, notification_no DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM notification WHERE member_no = #{memberNo} AND read_yn = 'N'
SELECT o.member_no AS memberNo, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.order_code AS orderCode FROM orders o WHERE o.order_no = #{orderNo}

SELECT o.member_no AS memberNo, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.order_code AS orderCode, d.delivery_no AS deliveryNo FROM delivery d JOIN orders o ON o.order_no = d.order_no WHERE d.delivery_no = #{deliveryNo}

SELECT oc.member_no AS memberNo, o.order_no AS orderNo, o.order_code AS orderCode, oc.claim_type AS claimType FROM order_claim oc JOIN order_item oi ON oi.order_item_no = oc.order_item_no JOIN orders o ON o.order_no = oi.order_no WHERE oc.claim_no = #{claimNo}
